title: The digital euro: Surveillance money, or a better alternative to cash?
summary: Proponents of the digital euro say its a better alternative to cash that’s fully backed by the ECB. But critics argue it could provide the EU with too much power over its citizens.

title: Franklin Templeton calls agentic AI next ‘killer’ use case for blockchain
summary: Franklin Templeton’s digital assets lead said that the autonomous AI agent economy will increase demand for blockchain protocols hosting machine-to-machine micropayments.

title: Stocks Fall Before Alphabet’s Results as Oil Jumps: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street investors bracing for the start of the megacap earnings season sent stocks lower, with the market also falling as worries about an escalation in the Iran war boosted oil prices.

title: Kuwait Bond Sale Bids Top $17.8 Billion Even as Iran Strikes
summary: Kuwait has drawn around $17.8 billion of investor orders for a benchmark dollar bond sale on Wednesday, highlighting resilient demand for the OPEC member’s debt even as it comes under daily missile and drone attacks from Iran.

title: VanEck: Bitcoin’s Summer Lull Masks a Tightening Supply Base
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

VanEck: Bitcoin’s Summer Lull Masks a Tightening Supply Base
VanEck says Bitcoin's quiet summer trading masks a tightening supply base, with cautious derivatives and weak miner economics weighing on the near term even as long-term holders continue accumulating.

title: Satsuma Shareholders Approve Bitcoin Liquidation, London Delisting
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Satsuma Shareholders Approve Bitcoin Liquidation, London Delisting
Satsuma shareholders voted to sell the company's bitcoin, return the cash to investors, and delist from the London Stock Exchange, ending its run as a bitcoin treasury company after heavy losses.

title: Centralized Elements 'Frequently Persist' in DeFi and Should Be Regulated: FATF
summary: Nearly every country has yet to apply the rules, the watchdog said, warning of outright bans for platforms that don’t comply.

title: Justin Sun's HTX 'Rotating' On-Chain Wallets Amid UK Sanctions: TRM Labs
summary: TRM Labs says the UK-sanctioned exchange has rotated hot wallets across blockchains, leaving address-list screening struggling to keep pace.

title: Tokenized equity perps drive RWA trading boom to $470 billion monthly volume
summary: Within the broader RWA category, tokenized equities have been the more popular asset class to trade over tokenized commodities.

title: Zilliqa halts native transactions over bug in its Ledger app dating to 2019
summary: Zilliqa halted native transactions after revealing a bug in its Ledger app dating to 2019 that exposed private keys via onchain signatures.

title: The US has collected about $13bn of Venezuela’s oil money. Where is it?
summary: Washington has given diverging accounts of where the earthquake-shattered country’s funds are going

title: The UK’s biggest university is a private company
summary: Supporters say franchised providers widen access to further education, but others doubt the real value of their ‘no frills’ courses
